transforms: Queried Wikidata records by ISO 3166-2 codes for Syria governorates.
Removed duplicate rows caused by multiple coordinate statements before normalization.
Used Wikidata English labels as canonical English governorate names and Arabic labels as canonical Arabic names.
Excluded coordinate statements from canonical centroids until the coordinate policy is reviewed.
reviewNotes: Seeded Wikidata QIDs, Arabic labels, English labels, ISO 3166-2 codes, and selected English aliases for all 14 Syrian governorates.
